message:
style: rustfmt normalization across fnp-dtype, fnp-linalg, fnp-random

Pure formatting pass with no logic changes except one derive addition:
- fnp-dtype: expand multi-line if/else, struct literals, method chains
- fnp-linalg: reformat dot product chains, eigenvalue computations,
  Givens rotations, batch operation signatures, test import lists
- fnp-random: reformat method chains in Pcg64DxsmRng, SeedSequence,
  BitGenerator state assignments, distribution lambdas, test arrays;
  add PartialEq + Eq derives to Generator for equality comparison
- fnp-random/ziggurat.rs: remove one blank line

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
